paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's governance and a recent convertible notes offering, with one director resigning due to governance concerns. There are also mentions of the stock's price movement and retail traders' views on the company's prospects. Sources of these headlines include Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Another filing, a SCHEDULE 13D/A, was submitted on July 8, 2026, and a DFAN14A filing was made on the same date, regarding the withdrawal of a solicitation to call a special meeting of shareholders. One Form 4 filing has been made, according to the filings summary.
